vocab.example: My art teacher was a beacon of inspiration, encouraging us to push the boundaries of our creativity.
What set him apart was his immense pedagogical expertise, as he could simplify even the most daunting calculus problems.
The mentorship I received from my science teacher truly paved the way for my current career in biotechnology.

vocab.meaning: sự ủng hộ không lay chuyển/kiên định
vocab.example: During my final exams, her unwavering support gave me the mental fortitude to stay focused and succeed.
He had such a charismatic personality that no one ever wanted to skip his literature classes.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tư duy phản biện
vocab.example: Instead of rote learning, she always tried to cultivate critical thinking by asking us provocative questions.
In the chaotic years of adolescence, my homeroom teacher acted as a guiding light for many of us.

vocab.meaning: tạo được sự đồng cảm/vang vọng với
vocab.example: The life lessons he shared during history class really resonated with me and changed my perspective on society.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tiềm năng của ai đó
vocab.example: A great teacher is someone who can identify and nurture a student's hidden potential before they even see it themselves.

vocab.meaning: thu hút/kiểm soát sự chú ý của...
vocab.example: She had an incredible ability to command the attention of the entire room the moment she started speaking.
